raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "2. En taæna tas KUNGS:
Ras schai Pilstahta valcêk/ tas
nomirs zaur Sobbinu/ zaur
Baddu/ un zaur Mehri/ bet kas
ahran eet pee teem Kaldeëreem/
tas dsihwohs/ un (isweffihß)
fawu Dwehselt ka Laupijumu/
un dsihwohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "3. Ta fakka tas KUNGS:
Schis Pilsfahts taps wiffai
nodohß kam Karra-Spehkaim
no Babeles Rohká/ ka tas to
usneim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Tad fazzija tee Leeli-Kun-
gi us to Kehninu : Leez jelle fcho
Wihrn nokant : Jo ta darra
wiꞥſch to Karra Wihru Rohkas
gurdenas/ kas weht schai Pils-
fahta atteek/ un tahe Rohkas
wiffn Lauschu/ kad wiꞥſch tah-
dus Wahrdus us teem runna/
ka fchee irr: Jo schis Wihrs ne
mekle fcho Lauschu Labklahtcha-
nu/ bet to Laununu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Un tas Kehninsch Zedeﬁ-
jus fazzija: Rangi/ tas irr juh-
äs Rohkäs/ jo tas Kehninsch ne
pehj prett jums neneeka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Tad jehme tee Jeremiju/
un mette to eekſch tahe Bedres
Malkius ta Dehla Anuneleka/
kas Zeetuma Pagalmá btja/ un
nolaide Jeremiju ar Wirwehm/
bet tai Bedrê ne btja Uhdens/
bet Duhnas/ un Jeremijus ee-
rimme Duhnäs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Kad nu EbedMeleks tas
Mohru Wihrs/ weens Kambar-
Junkurs/ kas Kehnina Nam-
ná btja/ dsirdeja/ ka tee Jeremi-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "8. Tad tsgahje Ebed Meleks
no ta kehnixa Namma/ un run-
naja us to Kehninu/ un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Mans Kungs Kehninsch/
schee Wihti irr taunadarijschi
eekſch wiffa/ ko tee irr darrijscht
pee ta Praweeta Jeremijus/ ko
tee irr Bedrê uettuschi/ kur
wiꞥſch tomehr jawá Weeta buh-
tu Baddá nomirris/ tapehz ka
Maises wairs Pilsfahta ne ir-
raid.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Tad pawehleja tas Keh-
ninsch Ebed Melekam tam Moh-
ru Wihran/ un fazzija : Nemm
no Schennenes trihsdefinitis Wihr-
rus ar tewim/ un iswelz to Pra-
weetu Jeremiju no tas Bedres/
pirms tas nomirst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Tad nehme EbedMeleks
tohs Wihrus ar fewim/un nahze
ta Kehnimu Namma appafsch to
Manta Kambara/ un nehme no
turrenes kahdus wezzus faplih-
fuschus/ un wezzus nodillufchus
Lakkatus/ un nolaide tohs pee
Jeremijus ar Wirivehm eekſch
tahe Bedres.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Un EbedMeleks tas Moh-
ru Wihrs fazzija us Jeremiju:
Leez jelle tohs wezzus faplihfu-
ſchus un nodillufchus Lakkatus
appafsch tarvu. Rohku Paduf-
feim apkahrt tahmt Wirwehm /
un Jeremijus darrija ta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Un tee iswilke Jeremiju
ar Wirwehm / un zehle winnu.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
